t_ch: 亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}…您觉得知更鸟前辈这样的歌手会有和我一样的痛苦吗？
t_en: Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}... Do you think Robin has experienced the same pain as I do?

t_ch: 我想她一定不会吧，她应该是家族中的明珠，从小就在学习高雅的谐乐，她的喜好就是家族的喜好，她的审美就是世人的审美。
t_en: I am certain she has not. She is the pride of her family, immersed in the study of elegant harmonies since childhood. Her tastes align with her family's, and her aesthetics align with the world's.

t_ch: 而我是已殒星神的卑贱遗民，从小喜爱的是古怪偏门的音乐，养成的审美是不入时宜的审美。我们和我的世界是时间的弃子，注定不能理解世人，世人也不会接纳我们。
t_en: On the other hand, I am the humble remnant of a fallen Aeon, raised with a passion for unconventional music, nurturing a sense of aesthetics that doesn't conform. My world and I are outcasts of time. We will never truly comprehend the world, and the world will never fully embrace us.

t_ch: 我爱素未谋面的故乡，爱那故事中的乌托邦…但我有时也会怨恨自己的出身，如果我不是声乐之星的孩子，而是出生在匹诺康尼，是不是唱出心声就能换来功名呢？
t_en: I love my homeland I have never seen, and I cherish the utopia found only in stories... Yet at times, I resent my origins. If I had not been born as a child of the planet of canticles but instead in Penacony, would my heartfelt singing have garnered recognition?

t_ch: 唉…我生在夜鹰的草窝，却又向往阳光下的高空。乘风的鸟儿随心扇动翅膀就能轻松高飞，而我想要去往同一片天空，就必须违心逆风而行……
t_en: *sigh* I was born in a night hawk's humble nest, yet I yearn for the sunlit heights. While an eagle effortlessly soars high by riding the wind, I must defy the wind and my own desires to reach the sky...

t_ch: 可恶的经纪人！可恶的匹诺康尼！可恶的鸢尾花家系！
t_en: Curse the manager! Curse Penacony! Curse the Iris Family!

t_ch: 总有一天…总有一天我会把你们的傲慢撕碎！把你们都当作我成名的垫脚石！
t_en: One day... one day, I will pulverize your arrogance! You will all become stepping stones on my path to fame!

t_ch: 拉洛丝的眉头紧锁，娇柔的肩膀不停颤抖，似乎是心中的怒火正在身体中翻滚。
t_en: Larose's brows are knitted tightly as her shoulders tremble with the roiling fury within her soul.

t_ch: 为了走上更大的舞台，我必须唱自己厌恶的歌曲，做自己不想做的事，对没品位的观众承欢献媚…这样的折磨还要到底还要持续多久？
t_en: How much longer do I have to sing songs I hate, do things I have no interest in, and cater to an audience with no taste... just to make it to the big stage?

t_ch: 你知道我第一次请求经纪人把「纯美之歌」放入演出歌单时，她做了什么吗？
t_en: Do you know what happened when I first asked her to add the "Song of Beauty" to the setlist?

t_ch: 她满脸笑容地答应了我，许诺一个月后为我举办演出。于是我废寝忘食地练习，每日每夜都在期待这场演出，她在这期间没有跟我说过任何舞台上的细节，只是让我做好准备。
t_en: With a bright smile on her face, she agreed and promised to arrange a performance for me in a month. I spent my days practicing, eagerly looking forward to the show, but she didn't provide any details during that period, simply instructing me to be prepared.

t_ch: 到了演出开始的那天，我满怀期待地走上鸢尾花家系的剧场——那里除了她之外没有一个人，没有听众，没有伴奏的乐手，甚至没有自动乐团。
t_en: However, when the day of the performance arrived, I walked onto the Iris Family's stage with great anticipation, only to find that she was the sole presence there: No audience, no accompanying musicians, not even an automated orchestra.

t_ch: 「醒醒吧，没有鸢尾花家系的宣传与包装，你和你的『纯美之歌』就是梦中无人问津的垃圾。」
t_en: "Snap out of it! Without the publicity and support of the Iris Family, you and your so-called Song of Beauty are just worthless trash in the Dreamscape."

t_ch: 这句话让我怒气填胸，却一句话也没有说出来，只能默默看着她走出剧场。因为…因为我没法反驳她，她是音乐的专家，是匹诺康尼「主流」的代表……
t_en: Her words filled me with fury, but I remained silent, watching her leave the theater. I couldn't argue with her... because she was an expert in music... a representative of the Penacony mainstream...

t_ch: 但总有一天我会让她后悔，我会成为独一无二的艺术权威，去定义新的「主流」——哪怕抛弃「纯美之歌」，也要站在比她更高的地方，撕碎她的傲慢！
t_en: But one day, I will make her regret it. I will become an authority, redefining the new "mainstream." Even if I have to abandon the Song of Beauty, I will rise above her and pulverize her arrogance!

t_ch: 亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您稍作留步，在时光停驻的梦境中不必如此匆忙。
t_en: Dear {M#Sir}{F#Miss}, please stay for a while. There's no need to hurry in this dreamscape where time stands still.

t_ch: 请收下这份宣传册吧，我会在这场音乐会上用歌声复现宇宙中失落的{RUBY_B#「纯美」}美好{RUBY_E#}，希望您不要错过。
t_en: Here, please take this pamphlet. I will be performing the song of {RUBY_B#Beauty}beauty{RUBY_E#} at this concert. Please don't miss it.

t_ch: 什么时候能忘掉呢？
t_en: When can I ever forget about it?

t_ch: 如此失败的我……
t_en: I'm such a failure...

t_ch: 一位女逐梦客站在栏杆外，对着下方的车流陷入沉思，看架势似乎是要跳下去。
t_en: A female Dreamchaser stood at the edge of the railing, lost in thought as she gazed upon the flowing traffic below, poised as if contemplating a leap.

t_ch: 不过，在梦里跳楼就像试图用气球砸死自己一样——全无可能。
t_en: Nonetheless, ending your life by jumping off a building in a dream is like trying to kill yourself with a balloon — Absolutely impossible.

t_ch: 不要轻生啊！
t_en: Don't take your own life!

t_ch: 轻生…可惜，这不过是毫无意义的表演罢了。
t_en: Take my own life... Alas, it's a shame that this is nothing more than a meaningless show.

t_ch: 听过你的话后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
t_en: The woman steps back to safety after hearing you.

t_ch: 你这样做只会从梦中醒来。
t_en: You'll only wake up from the dream if you do that.

t_ch: 醒来…是啊，这不过是毫无意义的表演罢了。
t_en: Wake up... Indeed, this is nothing more than a meaningless show.

t_ch: 听过你的话后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
t_en: The woman steps back to safety after hearing you.

t_ch: （静静观察）
t_en: (Observe silently)

t_ch: 沉默地站了一会儿后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
t_en: The woman steps back to safety after standing in silence for a while.

t_ch: 梦里不存在死亡，最大的刑罚就是回到残酷的现实…正如悲剧不会落幕，只会换个形式开场。
t_en: There's no death in dreams. The greatest punishment is to return to the harsh reality... A tragedy never concludes, but rather takes on a different form to begin anew.

t_ch: 作为一个警探，我居然连这都没想通……
t_en: As a detective, I can't believe I couldn't figure it out...

t_ch: 你有什么心事吗？
t_en: What's on your mind?

t_ch: …不过是一个失败者的自怨自艾罢了。
t_en: ...I was just wallowing in self-pity as a loser.

t_ch: 你是一个警探？
t_en: You are a detective?

t_ch: 是的，我是全宇宙最差劲的警探。
t_en: Yes, and I'm the worst kind in the entire universe.

t_ch: 我过往的人生中经历了许多事，其中绝大部分不值一提，另一小部分则能让我半夜在床上气得发抖。
t_en: I've gone through many things in my life, most of which aren't worth mentioning, but some are so infuriating that they leave me shaking in anger in the middle of the night.

t_ch: 我浪费过许多机会，做错过许多选择。我的人生就像一双沾满污泥的靴子，每一步都走得愈发沉重。
t_en: I've squandered many chances and made the wrong decisions many times. My life is like a pair of muddy boots that gets heavier with each step I take.

t_ch: 或许对我这样差劲的警探来说，那种事注定会发生……
t_en: Perhaps those things are destined to happen to a detective as incompetent as me...

t_ch: 我想跟你聊聊。
t_en: Can we talk...?

t_ch: 哦，随便吧…
t_en: Sure. Whatever...

t_ch: 你经常想不开吗？
t_en: Do you often have depressive thoughts?

t_ch: 你未免把我想得太脆弱了…虽然我确实算不上硬汉。
t_en: I'm not that weak, though I'm not exactly tough either.

t_ch: 我以前在这里尝试过几次，都成功了。但就像你说的，最后不外乎是回到现实、再做几轮噩梦罢了。
t_en: I've tried it many times here and succeeded. But just like what you said, the worst that happened was returning to reality and having several more rounds of nightmares.

t_ch: 现实远比梦境更加沉重。我在那里有酒、有诗，唯独没有死去的勇气。
t_en: Reality is way bleaker than dreams. I have the company of wine and poems there, and lack only the courage to finish things up.

t_ch: 到头来，这种表演既不能让我心安，也不能挽回我做过的错事……
t_en: In the end, this kind of performance neither brings me peace of mind nor undoes the wrongs I've done...

t_ch: 你为什么觉得自己失败？
t_en: Why do you see yourself as a failure?

t_ch: 我是一个道德家，是世界上最可笑的中间派，同时也是一个失败的警探。
t_en: I'm a moralist, the most ludicrous kind of centrist in the world. On top of all that, I'm also a lousy detective.

t_ch: 我曾是星际和平公司「传统项目部」的刑事案件调查员，但…我犯下了巨大的错误。
t_en: I was once a criminal case investigator for IPC's Traditional Project Department, but... I made a huge blunder.

t_ch: 在一次救援行动中，我射击嫌疑人的车辆，却意外击中了被劫持的人质——一个可怜的小女孩。
t_en: In a rescue operation, I accidentally hit the hostage, a poor girl, when I was firing at the suspect's vehicle.

t_ch: 我本来没想射她的，但那辆车颠簸得太厉害，开枪的机会又转瞬即逝……
t_en: It wasn't my intention to shoot her. The car was so bumpy, and the opportunity to fire would be gone in a fleeting second...

t_ch: 真是粗暴的救援方式…
t_en: That's some rough hostage-rescue tactics you employed there...

t_ch: 我知道，所以我才会一直没法忘怀……
t_en: I know, and that's why I've not been able to move on from the incident...

t_ch: 是故意的还是不小心？
t_en: Did you do it on purpose or was it an accident?

t_ch: 不，不是故意的…怎么可能是呢……
t_en: No, I didn't do it on purpose... How could it have been...

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent.)

t_ch: 那次失误不仅葬送了我的前途，还剥夺了一个孩子的生命。
t_en: Because of that mistake, I lost my job, and a little girl was killed.

t_ch: 我无法原谅这样的自己，便申请从公司离职——不过上头的领导比我快一步。在递交辞呈之前，我就已经被开除了。
t_en: Unable to forgive myself, I decided to leave the IPC. But my boss was a step faster. Fast enough to fire me before I could tender my resignation.

t_ch: 你看，我的失败是多么无可辩驳。世上再没有比我更不称职的警探了……
t_en: Look, my failure is simply irrefutable. There couldn't be a more incompetent detective in the world than me...

t_ch: 你为什么来到梦境？
t_en: Why did you come to the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 自从发生那件事后，每当我凝望夜空，眼前都会浮现出那孩子的脸。
t_en: After that incident happened, I kept seeing the girl's face whenever I stared into the night sky.

t_ch: 她没有表情，没有言语，但却像是在无声地质问我——凭什么？凭什么她死了，我却能好好活着？
t_en: She was expressionless and didn't utter a word, but she seemed to be confronting me in silence. Why? Why am I still alive when she's dead?

t_ch: 为了不看清她的脸，我每天都要用酒精灌醉自己。一旦停下，窒息感便会再次包裹我。
t_en: To avoid seeing her face, I got real familiar with the bottle. The suffocating feeling would envelop me again once I stopped.

t_ch: 我受够了！在收到匹诺康尼的邀请后，我几乎立刻逃进了梦里，祈祷这地方能治好我的心魔。
t_en: I'd had enough! The moment I received an invitation from Penacony, I almost fled to the Dreamscape immediately, hoping that the place could free me from emotional distress.

t_ch: 最开始还算有用，繁多的娱乐让我无暇回忆过往。可随着时间推移，各种熟悉的感觉又找了上来……
t_en: It worked in the beginning when the plethora of entertainment kept me too busy to think about my past. However, as time went on, those familiar sensations came crawling back to me...

t_ch: 到现在，只有苏乐达才能稍微麻痹我的神经，让我不再那么难受…倘若酒吧关门，我就无处可去。
t_en: Now, only SoulGlad could slightly numb my nerves and ease my pain... If the bar closes, I'll have nowhere else to go.

t_ch: 就聊这么多吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 嗯，再见……
t_en: Sure. See you around...

t_ch: 我想跟你聊聊。
t_en: Can we talk...?

t_ch: 好，我们可以聊聊过去的时光和死去的朋友们。
t_en: Sure, we can talk about our past and friends who have passed away.

t_ch: 你经常想不开吗？
t_en: Do you often have depressive thoughts?

t_ch: 哈，你未免把我想得太脆弱了…虽然我确实算不上硬汉。
t_en: Haha, I'm not that weak, though I'm not exactly tough either.

t_ch: 我以前在梦里尝试过几次跳楼，都成功了。但就像你说的，最后不外乎是回到现实、再做几轮噩梦罢了。
t_en: I've done it many times here and succeeded. But just like what you said, I only ended up returning to reality and having several nightmares.

t_ch: 现实远比梦境更加沉重。我在那里有酒、有诗，唯独没有死去的勇气。
t_en: Reality is way bleaker than dreams. I have the company of wine and poems there, and lack only the courage to finish things up.

t_ch: 不过现在，我已经不再需要寻死了。无论是梦境还是现实。
t_en: But now, I no longer have the urge to end my life, be it in the dreamscape or reality.

t_ch: 你和那个孩子之间发生过什么？
t_en: What's the story between you and that girl?

t_ch: 说来话长，我曾是星际和平公司「传统项目部」的刑事案件调查员，但…我犯下了巨大的错误。
t_en: It's a long story. I was once a criminal case investigator for IPC's Traditional Project Department, but... I made a huge blunder.

t_ch: 在一次救援行动中，我射击嫌疑人的车辆，却意外击中了被劫持的人质——一个可怜的小女孩。
t_en: In a rescue operation, I accidentally hit the hostage, a poor girl, when I was firing at the suspect's vehicle.

t_ch: 我本来没想射她的，但那辆车颠簸得太厉害，开枪的机会又转瞬即逝……
t_en: It wasn't my intention to shoot her. The car was so bumpy, and the opportunity to fire would be gone in a fleeting second...

t_ch: 真是粗暴的救援方式…
t_en: That's some rough hostage-rescue tactics you employed there...

t_ch: 我知道，所以我才会一直没法忘怀……
t_en: I know, and that's why I've not been able to move on from the incident...

t_ch: 是故意的还是不小心？
t_en: Did you do it on purpose or was it an accident?

t_ch: 不，不是故意的…怎么可能是呢？
t_en: No, I didn't do it on purpose... How could it have been...

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent.)

t_ch: 那次失误不仅葬送了我的前途，还剥夺了一个孩子的生命。
t_en: Because of that mistake, I lost my job, and a little girl was killed.

t_ch: 我无法原谅这样的自己，便申请从公司离职——不过上头的领导比我快一步。在递交辞呈之前，我就已经被开除了。
t_en: Unable to forgive myself, I decided to leave the IPC. But my boss was a step faster. Fast enough to fire me before I could tender my resignation.

t_ch: 有时不得不承认，这帮家伙对舆论的嗅觉还是挺敏锐的。
t_en: Sometimes, you just have to admit that these guys have a sharp sense when it comes to public opinion.

t_ch: 你为什么来到梦境？
t_en: Why did you come to the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 自从发生那件事后，每当我凝望夜空，眼前都会浮现出那孩子的脸。
t_en: After that incident happened, I kept seeing the girl's face whenever I stared into the night sky.

t_ch: 她没有表情，没有言语，但却像是在无声地质问我——凭什么？凭什么她死了，我却能好好活着？
t_en: She was expressionless and didn't utter a word, but she seemed to be confronting me in silence. Why? Why am I still alive when she's dead?

t_ch: 为了不看清她的脸，我每天都要用酒精灌醉自己。一旦停下，那股窒息的感觉便会再次包裹我。
t_en: To avoid seeing her face, I had to intoxicate myself every day with alcohol. The suffocating feeling would envelop me again once I stopped.

t_ch: 在收到匹诺康尼的邀请后，我几乎立刻逃进了梦里，祈祷这地方能治好我的心魔。
t_en: The moment I received an invitation from Penacony, I almost fled to the dreamscape immediately, hoping that the place could free me from emotional distress.

t_ch: 最开始还算有用，繁多的娱乐让我无暇回忆过往。可随着时间推移，只剩下苏乐达能稍微让我快活一些了——这也是我那么爱它的原因。
t_en: It worked in the beginning when the plethora of entertainment options kept me too busy to think about my past. However, as time went on, those familiar sensations came crawling back to me... Now, only SoulGlad can make me feel better, which is why I'm so obsessed with it.

t_ch: 不过现在，我也该在酒吧关门后找点其他的去处了。
t_en: I should probably find somewhere else to go after the bar closes.

t_ch: 就聊这么多吧。
t_en: Let's call it a day.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 嗯，再见……
t_en: Sure. See you around...

t_ch: 悲剧不会落幕，只会换个形式开场……
t_en: A tragedy does not conclude but rather takes on a different form to begin anew...

t_ch: 卢•阿彻咂了咂嘴，先前的悲痛似乎被替换成了一股…渴望。
t_en: Lew Archer smacks her lips. Her previous grief seems to have turned into some sort of... desire.

t_ch: 我突然感觉好渴，肯定是苏乐达瘾又犯了。得找个地方喝两口……
t_en: I'm feeling very thirsty all of a sudden. Guess my SoulGlad addiction is acting up again. I need to get a sip or two somewhere...

t_ch: 苏乐达还能喝上瘾？
t_en: Is SoulGlad addictive?

t_ch: 呃，那是个夸张手法。我只是需要饮料来抚慰精神而已。
t_en: Um, that's just an exaggeration. I just need a drink to lift my spirits.

t_ch: 不如喝水。
t_en: Nothing beats plain water.

t_ch: 呵，水哪有苏乐达好喝？来匹诺康尼就得喝苏乐达。
t_en: Water can't compare to the taste of SoulGlad! You've got to have SoulGlad when you're in Penacony.

t_ch: 不过，说到苏乐达嘛……
t_en: Speaking of SoulGlad...

t_ch: 卢•阿彻的眼神有些游离。她抚摸着头发，似乎在斟酌接下来要说的话。
t_en: Lew Archer's eyes seem hesitant. She runs her fingers through her hair while seemingly contemplating what to say next.

t_ch: …你是一个好人。
t_en: ...You're a good person.

t_ch: 怎么还发上好人卡了？
t_en: I didn't see that compliment coming.

t_ch: 谢谢，你也是。
t_en: Thanks. You too.

t_ch: 不，我不是那个意思……
t_en: Please allow me to explain...

t_ch: 你身上有一股特别的气质，和从前的我很像。有些人叫它「多管闲事」，而我更喜欢称之为——责任心。
t_en: You have a special demeanor that reminds me of my old self. Some label it as meddling, but I prefer to call it a sense of responsibility.

t_ch: 虽然在梦里跳楼不会出事，但这么长时间以来，除了家族，你是第一个愿意拉我一把的人。
t_en: Although I won't really die by jumping off the bridge in a dream, you're the first one, besides The Family, who's willing to lend me a hand in a long time.

t_ch: 再多「{RUBY_B#醒来}死{RUBY_E#}」几次，我说不定真要变得不正常了…不过梦里净是些怪家伙，跟他们比起来，我都算不上问题儿童，哈哈！
t_en: I might really go bonkers after a few more "{RUBY_B#wake}deaths{RUBY_E#}"... By the way, I still think I'm almost normal compared to the other weirdos here, haha!

t_ch: 来苏乐达俱乐部吧，我好好跟你喝上几瓶。
t_en: Come with me to SoulGlad Club. Let's have a few bottles of SoulGlad together.

t_ch: 来苏乐达俱乐部吧，我好好跟你喝两瓶。
t_en: Come with me to SoulGlad Club. Let's have two bottles of SoulGlad together.

t_ch: …难道是我眼花了吗？
t_en: ...Are my eyes failing me?

t_ch: 这里怎么有惊梦剧团？
t_en: How come the Dreamjolt Troupe is here?

t_ch: 果然，你也看见它了对吧！
t_en: You saw it too, didn't you?

t_ch: 你愣在这干什么？
t_en: Why are you standing around?

t_ch: 嘘，小心点，你看见路上那个东西了吗？
t_en: Shh, be careful. See that thing on the road?

t_ch: 我听说过这种怪物，但…它怎么会突然出现在大街上？家族的人呢？猎犬呢？难道没人发现它吗？
t_en: I've heard of that monster, but... why is it on the streets? Where are the people from The Family. The Bloodhounds? Hasn't anyone noticed it?

t_ch: 你看向四周，其他人都对这怪物熟视无睹——或许它有着和钟表小子类似的特性。
t_en: You look around and see that everyone else is oblivious to the monster. Perhaps it's only visible to some, just like Clockie.

t_ch: 啧，可不能让这东西大摇大摆地走在街上…既然猎犬不打算管，那就该我这个警探出场了！
t_en: Tsk, that thing isn't supposed to run free on the streets... Since the Bloodhound Family isn't going to deal with it, I'll carry out my duty as a detective!

t_ch: 苏乐达的事先放一放。我得去对付它，你赶快找地方避难吧。
t_en: Let's enjoy a drink of SoulGlad together next time. Now, I have to get rid of that thing. You should find a place to hide.

t_ch: 可别把我银河球棒侠看扁了！
t_en: No one is to look down upon the Galactic Baseballer!

t_ch: 我的球棒可不只是好看而已。
t_en: My baseball bat is more than just an eye candy!

t_ch: 你也要一起来？那好，我的后背就交给你了！
t_en: You want to come along? That's great! You can watch my back!

t_ch: 战斗即将结束时，眼前的怪物变成了一个小女孩。
t_en: As the battle is coming to an end, the monster transforms into a little girl.

t_ch: 妖孽，还不快现出原形！
t_en: Show yourself now, demon!

t_ch: 惊梦剧团还能变成人类？
t_en: Can a monster from the Dreamjolt Troupe turn into a human?

t_ch: 梦里真是什么都能发生…
t_en: It's true that anything can happen in a dream.

t_ch: 不对，你是…诺卡？真的是你吗？
t_en: Hold on. Are you... Noka? Is it really you?

t_ch: 卢•阿彻的语气里带着一丝哽咽，显然被戳中了内心的角落。
t_en: Lew Archer's voice choked with emotions. Something has hit a tender spot in her heart.

t_ch: 是我哦，卢•阿彻警官。自从你入梦以来，我就一直看着你。
t_en: It's me, Detective Archer. I've been watching you since you came here.

t_ch: …你的这副模样，让我很担心。我出现在这里、出现在你面前，就是为了对你说——
t_en: ...I'm worried about you, seeing you down in the dumps. I'm here because I have something to tell you...

t_ch: 没关系的，我并不在意那天发生的事；其实，我很感谢你能来救我。
t_en: I want you to know that I've never held it against you for what happened that day. In fact, I really appreciate you coming to my rescue.

t_ch: 不，我…我射中了你！即便我不是故意的，但、但这是能一笑了之的事情吗？
t_en: No, I... I shot you! It wasn't intentional, b—but it isn't a mistake that can be easily brushed off!

t_ch: 你原本可以享受大好人生，你的未来有那么多可能性，全都被我的失误给毁了！
t_en: You could have lived a wonderful life, with so many possibilities in your future. It was all ruined by me!

t_ch: 你应该恨我，然后痛骂我是个无能的废物。为什么，为什么你还能用那样的语气…原谅我？
t_en: You should hate me and call me useless. Why? How come you can still forgive me... with such a gentle tone?

t_ch: 因为你当时是来救我的啊。难道我应该去恨一个对我伸出援手的人吗？
t_en: It's because you were there to save me. Am I supposed to hate someone who helps me?

t_ch: 何况，一切都已经过去了。凶手受到了法律的制裁，我的家人也早就脱离了悲伤。
t_en: Moreover, everything is water under the bridge now. The murderer has been sentenced, and my family has long grieved for my passing.

t_ch: 只剩下你了，警官，只剩你没能走出来了。你打算让昨天的意外，缠住迈向明天的脚步吗？
t_en: You're the only one left, detective. Are you going to let an accident in the past stop you from embracing your future?

t_ch: 不要再缅怀过去了，那对我也是一种折磨。
t_en: Don't dwell on the past anymore. That too is torture to me.

t_ch: 终有一天，我们会再次相遇。哪怕我们已经不再是这副形体，不再是警探与人质，不再是「卢•阿彻」与「诺卡」。
t_en: One day, our paths will cross again, even though we might not look the same, are no longer a detective and a hostage, and are no longer Lew Archer and Noka.

t_ch: 回到你自己的生活中吧，希望这是我们最后一次见面。
t_en: Please pull yourself together. Return to your life. Hopefully, this is the last time we meet each other.

t_ch: 永别了，卢•阿彻警官。
t_en: Farewell, Detective Archer.

t_ch: 神秘的女孩消失在了烟雾中，没有留下半点痕迹。
t_en: The mysterious girl vanishes into the mist, leaving no trace.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼之梦里，居然还会发生这种事……
t_en: It's hard to believe something like this can take place in Penacony...

t_ch: 那孩子已经原谅了你。
t_en: That girl has forgiven you.

t_ch: 也许吧，但…总感觉莫名不真切。
t_en: Maybe, but... it still feels surreal to me.

t_ch: 可能是家族的特别关怀服务。
t_en: It might be a special counseling service provided by The Family.

t_ch: 家族可没闲心给一个失败的警探做心理辅导。
t_en: The Family doesn't have the time to arrange psychological therapy for a failed detective.

t_ch: 我怎么感觉一头雾水？
t_en: Why am I still confused?

t_ch: 抱歉了朋友，之后我会跟你详细讲述往事的——如果你愿意听的话。
t_en: I'm sorry, friend. I'll tell you all the details after this if you're interested.

t_ch: 不过现在，我需要好好消化一下刚才发生的事情。
t_en: But now, I need some time to process what happened earlier.

t_ch: 我应该高兴吗？就像梦泡里演的那样，伸个懒腰、然后迈向崭新的生活？
t_en: Should I be happy? Am I supposed to do a celebratory stretch and embark on a new life, like what the actors in dream bubbles always do?

t_ch: 这未免有些…太简单了。我甚至搞不清那到底真是诺卡的魂灵，亦或仅仅是我的幻想。
t_en: This seems... a bit too easy. I can't even be sure whether that was the real Noka, her soul, or merely a figment of my imagination.

t_ch: 我犯的错，真能那么轻易放下吗？
t_en: Can I really let go of my mistake so easily?

t_ch: 人总是要朝前看。
t_en: We can't always live in our past.

t_ch: 人总是要朝前看的。你所谓的自责，不过是用折磨自己的方式来逃避现实罢了。
t_en: We can't always live in our past. Blaming yourself is just your way of escaping reality.

t_ch: 如果你真想弥补过错，至少要先学会接受现实。
t_en: If you want to make up for your mistake, you've got to start by facing the reality.

t_ch: 已经过去的事无法挽回。
t_en: What's done cannot be undone.

t_ch: 已经过去的事无法挽回。就算再怎么悲伤，人死也不能复生。
t_en: What's done cannot be undone. No matter how grief-stricken you are, you can no longer bring the girl back to life.

t_ch: 你所谓的自责，不过是用折磨自己的方式来逃避现实罢了——如果你真想弥补过错，至少要先学会接受现实。
t_en: Blaming yourself is just your way of escaping reality. If you want to make up for your mistake, you've got to start by facing reality.

t_ch: 是啊，你说得对…过去发生的事无法抹除，就像石头的伤痕不会愈合。
t_en: Yes, you're right... What's done cannot be undone, just like time can never mend the cracks in a stone.

t_ch: 我能做的，只有接受现实，然后好好活到明天……
t_en: The only thing I can do is to accept reality and live my life well...

t_ch: 谢了，虽然这不是什么复杂的道理，但果然还是要由别人说出来才行。
t_en: Thanks a lot. Although it isn't something complicated, sometimes it takes someone else to say it for it to sink in.

t_ch: 我想，那孩子会永远留在我的脑海中…直到我与她一同归入虚无。
t_en: I think I'll always remember that girl... until we both return to dust.

t_ch: 呼~经历了那么多事，总算有空喝上一口苏乐达了。
t_en: Phew... After all that, I guess I finally have some time to have a drink of SoulGlad.

t_ch: 来吧，敬过去的时光和死去的朋友们。干杯！
t_en: Come on, let's drink to our past and departed friends. Cheers!

t_ch: 总有一天，我会好好治治这些反社会分子！
t_en: One of these days, I'll knock some sense into these sociopaths!

t_ch: 卢•阿彻凛冽地皱起了眉头，就像撞见扒手的警探。或许这是她的工作状态也说不定。
t_en: Lew Archer knits her eyebrows into a stern expression, just like a detective who sees a pickpocket. This is probably how she looks when she is at work.

t_ch: 在「黄金的时刻」待久了才发现，这里还真是满地奇葩啊——贬义的那种。
t_en: After spending some time in the Golden Hour, I realize this place is full of freaks.

t_ch: 上次我喝苏乐达的时候，特意听了听酒馆里其他人在谈论什么。真是不听不知道，一听吓一跳！
t_en: The last time I was here drinking SoulGlad, I pricked my ears to listen to what everyone else was talking about. I was shocked by what I heard.

t_ch: 有人说要带着怪物搞破坏，有人说要捣毁飞车的自动驾驶系统，还有人甚至要把整个匹诺康尼都烧成灰！
t_en: Some said they wanted to commit vandalism with their monsters, some planned to destroy the autopilot system of a flying car, and some even aimed to burn all of Penacony to the ground!

t_ch: 太可怕了。哪怕我已经不再是警探，这种消息也不能当作耳旁风。
t_en: How horrifying. Even though I'm no longer a detective, I can't ignore it when I hear things like that.

t_ch: 你去的酒馆…正经吗？
t_en: What kind of tavern was that?

t_ch: 也许他们只是开玩笑…
t_en: They were probably just joking around.

t_ch: 谁知道？这种人我倒是也见过不少。一个个都说要挣脱社会的束缚，好像公序良俗怎么碍着他们了一样。
t_en: Who knows? I've met my share of people like them. They're all eager to break free of the societal constraints as though law and order are hampering their lives.

t_ch: 但实际上呢？这些人的脑子比空垃圾袋还要浅薄，我一眼就把他们望到底！
t_en: The truth is, their mind is as empty as an unused trash bag! I can see right through them at a glance!

t_ch: 要是有机会，我非好好治治他们不可！这个你拿着，防身用。
t_en: I'll knock some sense into them if I have the chance! Please keep this. You can use it to defend yourself.

t_ch: 卢•阿彻凛冽地皱起了眉头，就像撞见扒手的警探。或许这是她的工作状态也说不定。
t_en: Lew Archer knits her eyebrows into a stern expression, just like a detective who sees a pickpocket. This is probably how she looks when she is at work.

t_ch: 在「黄金的时刻」待久了才发现，这里还真是满地奇葩啊——贬义的那种。
t_en: After spending some time in the Golden Hour, I realize this place is full of freaks.

t_ch: 一个个都说要挣脱社会的束缚，好像公序良俗怎么碍着他们了一样。
t_en: They're all eager to break free of the societal constraints as though law and order are hampering their lives.

t_ch: 但实际上呢？这些人的脑子比空垃圾袋还要浅薄，我一眼就把他们望到底！
t_en: The truth is, their mind is as empty as an unused trash bag! I can see right through them at a glance!

t_ch: 要是有机会，我非好好治治他们不可！
t_en: I'll knock some sense into them if I have the chance!

t_ch: 我无法前进…但最终我会前进。
t_en: I'm stuck now... but I'll move forward eventually.

t_ch: 卢•阿彻冷静了下来。她的眉眼平常自带一股威严，只是伤感时看不分明。
t_en: Lew Archer composes herself. She has a piercing gaze that makes it hard to tell when she is in grief.

t_ch: 仔细想想，哪怕诺卡真的已经原谅了我，我也没法回去继续当警探了。
t_en: Come to think of it, I don't think I can return to my post as a detective even if Noka has truly forgiven me.

t_ch: 倒也没必要惦记那一官半职…从今往后，我会以私家侦探的身份继续活动，为「黄金的时刻」铲除威胁。
t_en: I'm not too keen on it either... From now on, I'll work as a private detective who eliminates dangers in Golden Hour.

t_ch: 我只是感慨，有些事情的影响，比人的一生还要长啊……
t_en: I just can't help lamenting the everlasting impact some incidents can have on one's life...

t_ch: 哟，我的朋友，来两瓶苏乐达？
t_en: Fancy some SoulGlad, my friend?

t_ch: 哈，活着的感觉真好！
t_en: Aha, it feels amazing to be alive!

t_ch: 你活着，我也活着，活着就是无限的可能性！
t_en: You're alive, I'm alive. Anything is possible when we're alive!

t_ch: 既然过去的事情都已过去，我也该展开全新的生活了——先从这「黄金的时刻」开始吧！
t_en: Since the bygones are bygones, it's time I start my life anew. I'll begin in the Golden Hour!

t_ch: 卢•阿彻嘴角上扬，不自然地笑着，似乎是苏乐达喝多了。
t_en: Lew Archer breaks into an unnatural grin. She seems to have had too much SoulGlad.

t_ch: 卢•阿彻嘴角上扬，不自然地笑着，似乎是苏乐达喝多了。
t_en: Lew Archer breaks into an unnatural grin. She seems to have had too much SoulGlad.

t_ch: 呵，我知道啊，我都知道的……
t_en: Ha, I understand. I get it all...

t_ch: 大家都是草台班子，不存在永不破灭又井井有条的美梦。哪怕这里也一样……
t_en: We're all part of a backwater troupe. No dreams, including here, can exist in an orderly manner forever...

t_ch: 之前格拉克斯大道上有对小两口吵架，我出于好心上去调解。结果呢？两边一起怼起我来了。
t_en: Some time ago, a couple was bickering on Glaux Avenue. I went up to mediate out of goodwill, but what happened next? Both sides turned on me at the same time.

t_ch: 你说我管这些闲事干啥？都不如去搞几瓶苏乐达。也不知道兜里的钱还够不够……
t_en: Why bother to help when others see me as a busybody? My time is better spent on getting myself some SoulGlad. I wonder if I have enough money in my pocket...

t_ch: 话说回来，我原本好像是为了戒酒才入梦的来着？无所谓了……
t_en: But then again, wasn't I here because I wanted to quit drinking? It doesn't matter now...

t_ch: 人常道双眼是心灵之窗，彼时我不懂得这句话真正的含义；而今历遍坎坷曲折，此刻的我正凝视着匹诺康尼，妄想目光能穿透她奢靡又虚荣的表象……
t_en: Our eyes are often said to be the window to our souls. Back then, I wasn't able to grasp the true meaning of this phrase. But now, having gone through some ups and downs, I find myself staring at Penacony, hoping that my gaze can penetrate its extravagant and vain façade...

t_ch: 她雍容华贵、纸醉金迷，永不熄灭的灯火是她颈间的珍珠、腕上的砗磲…只有为她献上更多，才有机会获得她的垂青。
t_en: She exudes an air of elegance and luxury. The unceasing lights are the pearls on her necklace and the agates on her bracelet... Only by offering things to her can one stand a chance of gaining her favor.

t_ch: 而现在，外乡人——有个难得的机遇正摆在你面前，让你能够更好地融入这个浮华喧嚣的大都会。你愿意抓住它吗？
t_en: Outworlder, you now have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to better assimilate in this grand and bustling metropolis. Will you seize it?

t_ch: 你也不像本地人啊？
t_en: You don't look like a local either.

t_ch: …这不重要，重要的是眼前的机遇能给你带来什么！
t_en: ...That isn't the point. You should focus on what this chance can bring you!

t_ch: 你就是谜语人？
t_en: Are you a Riddler?

t_ch: 粗鲁！我好心抛出橄榄枝，居然落得你这种反应……
t_en: How boorish! I can't believe this is how you respond to my kind offer...

t_ch: 听着，我可以为你提供一份兼职，而事成之后你可以得到一大笔钱——数字将大到你无法想象。
t_en: Listen, I have a part-time job for you. If you complete the job well, you'll earn a fortune — a sum you can hardly imagine.

t_ch: 工作内容非常简单——帮我收集一个人的信息。手段包括但不限于：记录她的工作与生活轨迹、并保存相关的影像，通过各种渠道获取她的信息……
t_en: It's pretty simple — I need you to gather a person's info for me. The means available to you include but are not limited to: Recording her work and her everyday life, saving relevant images and videos, and obtaining any information about her via any channel possible...

t_ch: 打住！这也太变态了…
t_en: Stop! This sounds sick to me...

t_ch: 跟踪偷拍、调查隐私…
t_en: Stalking, secret filming, nonstop surveillance...

t_ch: 什…？！你、你把我当什么人了！我可不是…哦，想来你还不知道我的身份——
t_en: Wha...!? Wh—What kind of wrong idea are you getting? I'm not... Oh, I see. I haven't told you anything about me...

t_ch: 我曾经是个漫画家，后来成为了制片人，还登上过艾普瑟隆的《星系艺术家》杂志——你可知道能被那本杂志报道的都是什么级别的人物？
t_en: I used to be a manga artist, and I'm now a producer. I was even featured in the Galactic Artists magazine of Epsilon before! Do you have any idea how big a deal that is?

t_ch: 咳，闲话少说。我想调查的人，其实是猎犬家系的某位高层。我正打算以她为原型，拍摄一部超级英雄电影。
t_en: Ahem, let me cut to the chase here. The subject of my investigation is a big shot in the Bloodhound Family, and I'm planning to film a superhero movie about her.

t_ch: 听着就不正经，我拒绝。
t_en: It sounds shady to me. I'm not doing it.

t_ch: 哎…我这人做事，向来讲究个你情我愿。你既然执意如此，我也不好强求。
t_en: Well... I never force people into doing things they don't like. Since you insist on saying no, I won't push you.

t_ch: 不过嘛，要是你改变主意了，我倒是可以考虑再给你个机会。
t_en: Anyway, if you change your mind, I'll consider giving you another chance.

t_ch: 她那美丽的眼睛正注视着我，而我回望以满腔深情…嗯，你来啦，是打算帮我去调查了吗？
t_en: Her mesmerizing eyes are staring at me, and I look back with an affectionate gaze... Eh, you're back. Are you ready to help me with my investigation?

t_ch: 眼前的皮皮西突然痛苦地抱头，整个人簌簌颤抖起来。
t_en: The Pepeshi before you suddenly clutches his head in agony, with his body trembling uncontrollably.

t_ch: …为什么！为什么——告诉我！我到底做错了什么？！
t_en: ...Why? Tell me what I did wrong!?

t_ch: 没完没了地网暴我，说我德才堪忧…我已经被逼得道歉了，你们还想我怎么做？！
t_en: Those brutal netizens keep questioning my character and abilities... I've already offered my apology. What else do they want me to do!?

t_ch: <size=28>是不是只有我死了，你们才肯放过我？！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Is my death the only thing that can appease them!?</size>

t_ch: 你还好吗…
t_en: Are you okay...

t_ch: 大兄弟，冷静点！
t_en: Calm down, buddy!

t_ch: ..哈哈...没错、没错！人们或早或晚，总归要直面内心深处的自己...而现在我听到了，那甜蜜的寂静与安宁正召唤着我——
t_en: ...Haha... Yeah, indeed! Sooner or later, one will face their true self... I can hear it now. Sweet silence and peace are calling me...

t_ch: 我就像只被困于笼中的鸟儿，只有鼓起勇气一跃而下，才能真正获得自由！
t_en: I'm like a bird trapped in a cage. Jumping off bravely is my only way to freedom!

t_ch: 哈…想我在世间走这一遭，一路磕磕绊绊、始终与梦想相伴…而如今…没想到最后竟是你陪在我身边。
t_en: Alas... Looking back at my journey, I've never given up my dream, no matter how challenging things are... I didn't expect it was you who stayed by my side in the end.

t_ch: 朋友啊，就此别过了——现在我只想静静离去，就像清醒者在黎明前悄然踏上旅途，不惊醒画眉与晨露——<color=#f29e38ff>千万别来找我，也不要让旁人来搅扰这份安宁！</color>
t_en: It's time to go our separate ways, my friend... I wish to depart in silence, just like a soberer who sets off before dawn so as not to awaken the birds and dew... <color=#f29e38ff>Please don't come looking for me, and don't let others disturb my peace!</color>

t_ch: 我不愿造成什么麻烦，<color=#f29e38ff>尤其不愿惊动*猎犬*。</color>就让我在<color=#f29e38ff>筑梦边境</color>悄无声息地去吧！就像鸟儿划过天际，不留一丝痕迹……
t_en: I don't want any trouble, and <color=#f29e38ff>alerting the *Bloodhound* is the last thing I want to happen.</color> Just let me go quietly at the <color=#f29e38ff>Dream's Edge</color>! I want to be like a bird that flies across the sky without leaving a single trace...

t_ch: …你终究还是来了，我不是说过——嗯？怎么就你一个人？！
t_en: ...You're here, after all. Didn't I tell you... Eh? How come you're alone!?

t_ch: 你别想不开啊
t_en: Don't be upset.

t_ch: 你还想我叫谁过来？
t_en: Who else do you expect to come here?

t_ch: …我…我…不是、没什么，我是说，就你一个人也挺好的……
t_en: ...I... I... No, nothing. I mean it's good enough that you make it here...

t_ch: 你是来为我送行的吗，朋友？那么你是否也有着和我同样的感受——
t_en: Are you here to see me off, my friend? Do you feel the same way as I do...

t_ch: 纵览世界之大，却无我等一方容身之处；当我们在匹诺康尼的灯火中蓦然回首，却惊觉自己终究不过是个无根过客……
t_en: There's no place for people like us, even though the world is vast. When we look back on our journey in Penacony, it will dawn upon us that we are nothing but some travelers without a place to belong...

t_ch: 你就没有什么留恋的吗？
t_en: Don't you have anything you'll miss?

t_ch: …怎么会没有！我的梦想，我一路挥洒的汗水、迄今取得的成就——它们是我的枷锁，却也令我无论如何也不愿放手。
t_en: ...You bet! My dream, my hard work along the way, and my achievements so far... They are my shackles, but I can't let them go no matter how hard I try.

t_ch: 可是梦里根本摔不死。
t_en: But it's impossible to fall to your death in a dream.

t_ch: 啊？哦…我知道了，你这是在对我用激将法，但我是不会上当的！
t_en: Huh? Oh... I see you're trying to provoke me, but I won't fall for it!

t_ch: 我本不愿与那些攻讦我、诋毁我的同僚计较，也早已练就了「在唾沫星子里捞金」的本事，可这次……
t_en: I didn't want to stoop to the level of my colleagues who degraded and slandered me, and I've long mastered the skill to see the good in the negative remarks made about me, but this time...

t_ch: 我知道他们嫉妒我…我不怕他们骂我，但决不能容忍自己的梦想在他们手中毁于一旦！
t_en: I know they're jealous of me... They can say whatever they want about me, but I can't allow them to ruin my dream!

t_ch: 那你更该珍惜自己的人生！
t_en: That's all the more reason for you to cherish your life then!

t_ch: 是啊，你说得对，我该努力取得更高的成就、狠狠打他们的脸。
t_en: You're right. I should strive for greater achievements to prove them wrong!

t_ch: 但你不会明白……
t_en: But you won't get it...

t_ch: 跳吧，最好再来个后空翻。
t_en: Go ahead and jump. Do a backflip if you can.

t_ch: 你、你这人怎么这么没同理心？！我就知道，这世界上所有人都一样…一样的冷漠、一样的刻薄！
t_en: H—How can you have so little empathy!? I knew it! Everyone in this world is cold and mean!

t_ch: 像你这样的人一定不会明白……
t_en: People like you will never get it...

t_ch: …不会明白一直以来，我究竟承受了多大的压力、多大的痛苦……
t_en: ...You won't understand the amount of pressure and pain I've had to bear all this while...

t_ch: 每次在深夜里看到些铺天盖地的侮辱与谩骂，我都忍不住崩溃得大哭，却又不得不在第二天装得像个没事人似的……
t_en: I can't help breaking down every time I'm bombarded by insulting and scathing remarks in the middle of the night. Yet, I have to act like nothing is wrong the next day...

t_ch: 你知道——啊！救命——！！！
t_en: You know—Ahhhh! Help!!!

t_ch: 说时迟那时快，天台边摇摇欲坠的皮皮西一个鹞子翻身，死死拽住了你的胳膊。
t_en: The Pepeshi, who seems close to falling off the rooftop, flips his body in the nick of time and grabs your arm for dear life.

t_ch: 他矮小的身躯中竟爆发出惊人的力量，将你的手臂勒出一圈红痕。
t_en: He summons an astonishing amount of strength from his petite figure, leaving a circular red mark on your arm.

t_ch: …呼…吓、吓死我了…差点就没命了……
t_en: ...Phew... Th—That was scary... I almost died...

t_ch: 冷静下来了吗？
t_en: Have you calmed down now?

t_ch: 现在还想跳吗？
t_en: Do you still want to jump now?

t_ch: …从这…鬼门关前…走了一遭，我…呼…突然就领悟了人生的真谛。
t_en: ...After... going through... that narrow escape, I... phew... have had an epiphany on the true meaning of life.

t_ch: 正所谓…「凡杀不死我的，必使我更强大」…走、走吧，我们先回去，我需要稍微冷静一下。
t_en: What doesn't kill me makes me stronger... L—Let's go. I need to get a grip.

t_ch: 你往前小心翼翼地挪了几步，皮皮西警惕地瞥了你一眼，却似乎并没阻止你的打算。
t_en: You carefully step forward, and the Pepeshi person shoots you a warning look, but doesn't seem to be stopping you.

t_ch: 你继续朝着他移动，皮皮西此刻正沉浸在自己的情绪中，没注意到你的动作。
t_en: You continue to move towards him, but the Pepeshi person is too absorbed in his own emotions to notice your movements.

t_ch: 啊，果然…那句话怎么说的来着？留着青山在，不怕没柴烧！
t_en: Ah, I get it now... What's that saying again? Where there's life, there's hope!

t_ch: 多谢你，陌生人！是你教会了我这个道理，以后我再也不会动不动就自暴自弃了！
t_en: Thank you so much for this valuable lesson, stranger! I won't ever slide into self-destruction again!

t_ch: 我教你什么了？
t_en: What have I taught you?

t_ch: 你教会了我…我想想…哦对！你教会了我「即使人生已经被逼到死角，还要尝试找到根救命稻草」这个道理！
t_en: Well... let me think... Yes! You made me realize I should always try to "find a way out even though my life seems to be a drought"!

t_ch: 这是你自己发明的谚语？
t_en: Did you come up with that saying yourself?

t_ch: 居然还押上了。
t_en: I'm surprised it rhymes.

t_ch: 你、你为什么要阴阳怪气！我这是在对你表示感激，这都听不出来吗？
t_en: Wh—Why are you being sarcastic? I'm expressing my gratitude to you. Can't you tell?

t_ch: 明明是你自己怂了。
t_en: You clearly chickened out just now.

t_ch: 你、你这人怎么这样说话！我这是在对你表示感激，这都听不出来吗？
t_en: Wh—What are you talking about!? I'm expressing my gratitude to you. Can't you tell?

t_ch: 算了，我也不指望你能完全明白我的境遇！每当我面对业界的打压抵制还有忘恩负义的员工时，那种扑面而来的压力……
t_en: Forget it! I never expect you to fully understand my plight! The pressure of dealing with the boycott against me in the industry and my ungrateful employees is just too much sometimes...

t_ch: 唉，心累！我知道自己选择的并非一条康庄大道…我得一直抓踩着荆棘往上爬，这样才能离那些高高在上的梦想近一点、再近一点……
t_en: This is exhausting! I understand I've chosen a challenging path for myself... I have to brave through numerous hurdles to get closer to my lofty ambition...

t_ch: 好了，让我稍微歇歇吧…这些，你拿去！就当是为了感谢你这根救命稻草的谢礼！
t_en: Now, I need to rest... Here, take this! Consider it a token of appreciation for being my lifesaver!

t_ch: 泪水从硕大的墨镜后滑落，剔透又晶莹，像极了——用皮皮西自己的话来说——那「掩藏于残酷现实背后的、最纯洁又最脆弱的梦想」。
t_en: Tears trickle down behind his oversized sunglasses. The translucent and glistening teardrops are much like — in the Pepeshi's own words — "the purest yet fragile dream obscured by the harsh reality."

t_ch: 啊…朋友，你要不要听我讲个故事？
t_en: Oh... my friend, can I interest you with a story?

t_ch: 从前有个年轻人，出生在艾普瑟隆星系边陲的某颗星球。那里贫瘠、闭塞、落后，那里的人从出生的那刻起，一辈子就能望到头。
t_en: Once upon a time, there was a youngster born on a remote planet on the edge of the Epsilon system. The planet was barren, isolated, and backward. The future of the people there was very much predictable from the moment of their birth.

t_ch: 但年轻人心有不甘，他不想从生到死都只能看见同样的景色——他憧憬瑰丽的奇景，想要像故事里的*无名客*那样自由地遨游宇宙。
t_en: However, the youngster was reluctant to resign himself to his fate. Not wanting to see the same view for his entire life, he aspired to witness all the wonders in the universe and roam freely around like the *Nameless* in the stories.

t_ch: 他等待着、谋划着，终于在<unbreak>13</unbreak>岁那年，成为某个外来取材的漫画家的助手——从此，再没有什么能阻碍他了 。
t_en: He waited and made plans for it. Finally, at the age of <unbreak>13</unbreak>, he became an assistant to a visiting manga artist who came to find inspiration. From then on, nothing could stand in his way.

t_ch: 年轻人肯上进、能吃苦，很快就继承了老师的衣钵…<unbreak>18</unbreak>岁那年他出版了自己的第一部作品，漫画界一颗耀眼的新星横空出世……
t_en: Being diligent and resilient, it didn't take long for the youngster to pick up the skills from his master... He published his first work when he was <unbreak>18</unbreak>, marking the meteoric rise of a brilliant new star in the world of manga...

t_ch: 年轻人越发努力，他想要成功、想要证明自己。后来他又进军电影行业，想要让自己的作品为更多人所了解、所喜爱。
t_en: The youngster worked even harder, driven by a desire for success and a need to prove himself. Later, he ventured into the movie industry, aiming to make his works known and appreciated by a wider audience.

t_ch: 可很快，他发现自己周围群狼环伺——业内的同僚联合起来打压他，曾经一起奋斗的同好们背叛了他，越来越多的人通过网络攻击他、污蔑他…可他又何罪至此呢？
t_en: But soon, he found himself becoming the target of resentment. His peers in the industry ostracized him, his companions who once worked alongside him betrayed him, and more and more netizens attacked him online... What did he do to deserve this?

t_ch: 他不过是在孜孜不倦地追逐那高高在上的梦想，就像逐星的巨人！难道只因巨人所到之处大地震颤不已，人们便要说他有罪吗？
t_en: He was merely pursuing his dream, like a giant reaching for the stars! Should the giant be condemned just because the earth trembles wherever it goes?

t_ch: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
t_en: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

t_ch: 什…看来你比我想象中要开放得多啊，我的朋友……
t_en: Wha... Seems like you're more open-minded than I thought, my friend...

t_ch: 我倒是不讨厌你，不过我们或许可以将这件事安排在…你帮我完成「取材」之后？
t_en: I don't hate you, but can we put off this thing until... you finish helping me gather inspiration?

t_ch: 皮皮西盯着你，似乎在估量你价值几何——即便你只看到他黑漆漆的镜片。
t_en: The Pepeshi fixates his gaze on you, seemingly to gauge your worth, though all you can see is his dark lenses.

t_ch: 说起来…你救了我，我理应报答你——
t_en: Come to think of it... you've saved my life. I should return the favor...

t_ch: 那么来吧，来为我工作吧，我绝不会亏待你！
t_en: Well, why don't you work for me? I'll treat you well!

t_ch: 只要你帮我完成「取材」，我甚至可以让你成为下一部电影的主角！
t_en: As long as you help me gather inspiration, I can make you the protagonist of my next movie!

t_ch: 设想一下：在这奇迹与罪恶并存的梦想之城，总有些霓虹灯也照不亮的角落；而你，我的朋友，将化身聚光灯下的超级英雄，只身对抗人们的噩梦——邪恶可怖的惊梦剧团！
t_en: Imagine this: In this city of dreams where miracles and crimes coexist, there are places so dark that not even the neon lights can reach. You, my friend, will be the superhero under the spotlight. All by yourself, you'll battle with the nightmares of the people — the evil and horrifying Dreamjolt Troupe!

t_ch: 对于这部电影，我打算投入重资，并亲自担任导演和编剧。感受到了吗，朋友——光明的未来在等着我们！
t_en: I plan to invest heavily in this movie, and I'll direct it and write the script myself. Can you feel it now, my friend? A bright future is ahead of us!

t_ch: …卑鄙、无耻、下作！
t_en: ...How vile, shameless, and despicable!

t_ch: 这个世界总对努力的人如此苛刻！不、不能再这么下去了，我得想办法……
t_en: The world is always so hard on people who work hard! No! I can't allow things to go on like this. I have to think of a way...

t_ch: 我投了那么多钱…那么多钱！结果呢？连本都没回！
t_en: I invested so much money... So much! But how did it end? I didn't even get my capital back!

t_ch: 豪华的全明星阵容、尖端的技术特效，再加上《灵魂印刻》漫画原本的人气…无论如何它的票房都不该是这样！
t_en: It has a glamorous all-star cast, state-of-the-art special effects, and the popularity of the original Soulsealer manga... The box office of the movie shouldn't be like this!

t_ch: 一定又是他们在针对我——嫉妒我年纪轻轻就名利双收！明明是自己不肯与时俱进、回应市场需求，凭什么要对我架起矛头！
t_en: They must have sabotaged me! They were jealous of my fame and success at such a young age! Why didn't they blame themselves for being outdated and oblivious to the market demands? Why did they come at me?

t_ch: 再说了，就算我真的经常和员工培养感情又如何？凭什么因为这点小事就污蔑我审美低俗、对青少年造成不良影响？
t_en: Also, what's wrong with me having a close relationship with my employees? Why should I be criticized for having vulgar taste and being a negative influence on teenagers?

t_ch: 这个世界总对努力的人如此苛刻！不、不能再这么下去了，我得想办法……
t_en: The world is always so hard on people who work hard! No! I can't allow things to go on like this. I have to think of a way...

t_ch: 皮皮西凝神注视着那些奢侈品，硕大墨镜上的反光与橱窗里的灯光交相辉映。
t_en: The Pepeshi gazes intently at the luxury goods. The reflection on his oversized shades shimmers in harmony with the lights from the display window.

t_ch: 你知道吗，我最大的优点就是敏锐的嗅觉——尤其是对于金钱与时尚。
t_en: You know what? My keen senses, especially for money and fashion, are my strong suit.

t_ch: 在这嗅觉的引领下，我走出了故乡…而今它又引领着我来到神往已久的匹诺康尼……
t_en: Thanks to my intuition, I left my homeland... Now, it guides me to my long-desired Penacony...

t_ch: 果然，这繁华的大都会才是我理想中的栖身之处——在这里，只要有钱就能买到一切；而越是挥金如土，你就越能感受到一种无比的欢乐、一种亲昵的归属……
t_en: Indeed, this vibrant metropolis is the ideal place for me to settle down. Money can buy anything here. The more you splurge, the more you can feel an unparalleled joy and a sense of belonging...

t_ch: 喏，你来尝尝——就连这{RUBY_B#苏乐达}气泡水{RUBY_E#}，它在匹诺康尼的口味都要比银河中的别处更加甜美！
t_en: Here, taste it. Even this {RUBY_B#SoulGlad}soda{RUBY_E#} tastes better in Penacony than other places across the cosmos!

t_ch: 你知道吗，我最大的优点就是敏锐的嗅觉——尤其是对于金钱与时尚。
t_en: You know what? My keen senses, especially for money and fashion, are my strong suit.

t_ch: 在这嗅觉的引领下，我走出了故乡…而今它又引领着我来到神往已久的匹诺康尼……
t_en: Thanks to my intuition, I left my homeland... Now, it guides me to my long-desired Penacony...

t_ch: 果然，这繁华的大都会才是我理想中的栖身之处——在这里，只要有钱就能买到一切；而越是挥金如土，你就越能感受到一种无比的欢乐、一种亲昵的归属……
t_en: Indeed, this vibrant metropolis is the ideal place for me to settle down. Money can buy anything here. The more you splurge, the more you can feel an unparalleled joy and a sense of belonging...

t_ch: 可以聊聊吗？
t_en: Are you up for a chat?

t_ch: 哦…？怎么，你想开了？我就说嘛，怎么会有人和钱过不去呢！
t_en: Oh? Have you decided to take up my offer? I told you no one could resist the temptation of money!

t_ch: 你说自己是制片人？
t_en: You're a producer, right?

t_ch: 没错！<unbreak>18</unbreak>岁时，我人生中的第一部漫画——《那年青春的我们迷失于幻想中的孤岛》出版了，而后我便一举成名。
t_en: That's right! I published my first manga, Lost Island, when I was 18, and I rose to fame immediately.

t_ch: 那之后我一路披荆斩棘，不知吃了多少苦、流了多少汗，终于获得了自己应有的荣誉与地位、过上了一直向往的生活。
t_en: Later on, I overcame obstacles along the way and earned the accolades and status I deserved through my blood, sweat, and tears. I finally got to live the life I'd always desired.

t_ch: <unbreak>30</unbreak>岁那年，我将自己的漫画《沉醉于你的耀眼光芒》改编为电影，并因此斩获惊人的票房，受到星际间无数年轻人的追捧。
t_en: At the age of 30, I adapted my manga, Mesmerized by Your Charm, into a movie, which turned out to be a phenomenal box office hit. The movie was all the rage among the youngsters in the universe.

t_ch: 那之后我又拍了几部电影…可惜反响平平。现在，我为寻找灵感来到匹诺康尼，希望这座城市能回馈我的努力……
t_en: I made several more movies after that, but the response was mediocre. So, here I am in Penacony, in search of inspiration. I hope this city will reward my efforts...

t_ch: 你想调查的那位家族高层…
t_en: About that Family big shot you want to investigate...

t_ch: 怎么，打算接我的活了？那提前给你透露一下工作内容也不是不行——
t_en: Why? Have you decided to take the job? Well, I can tell you something about the job first...

t_ch: 我的取材对象是有着「白日梦酒店最强」之称的猎犬薇丝普——一个平日里不苟言笑、深不可测的强者。
t_en: Her name is Whisper, a member of the Bloodhound Family known as "The Reverie Titan." She's a formidable figure who rarely smiles and is difficult to fathom.

t_ch: 据说只要是她出现的地方，惊梦剧团都会退避三舍、作鸟兽散，简直就是酒店的活传奇！
t_en: Rumor has it that the Dreamjolt Troupe will flee in all directions at the sight of her. She's a legend of the hotel!

t_ch: 在见到她的第一眼，我就知道自己的下一部电影有着落了…对了，你在跟…咳、我是说调查的时候小心点，看你这小身板，估计禁不住她一拳。
t_en: The first time I set my sights on her, I immediately knew what I should do for my next movie... By the way, when you're stalkin— Ahem, I mean... investigating her, please be more careful. I doubt you can take a punch from her judging by your size.

t_ch: 不聊了。
t_en: That's it for today.

t_ch: 好好想想吧，只要你愿意为我工作，事后好处必然少不了。
t_en: Take your time to think it over. As long as you're willing to work for me, you'll be rewarded handsomely.

t_ch: 就这样吧，拜拜。
t_en: That's all. Bye-bye.

t_ch: 相信我——你不会后悔选择为我办事的！
t_en: Believe me, you won't regret it!

t_ch: 你看见这位智械的身上刻着「格-蕾」二字——不是铭牌，而是直接刻在了外壳上。
t_en: The words "Go-Ray" are engraved directly on the body of this Intellitron instead of on a nameplate.

t_ch: 看见垃圾，回收垃圾。保护环境，从我做起。今天，你有拾起脚边的垃圾吗？
t_en: I see trash, I pick up trash. Everyone plays a part in protecting the environment. Have you picked up the trash on the ground today?

t_ch: 梦里也存在垃圾吗？
t_en: Does trash exist in dreams too?

t_ch: 现实存在物质的垃圾，梦中自然也有精神的垃圾。
t_en: There's physical trash in the real world, and there's psychological trash in dreams.

t_ch: 人们在现实认识垃圾、记住垃圾，也会在梦里产生垃圾的意象。正如人们无需在梦中进食，却依然可以开办餐馆、发明食物……
t_en: When people see trash in the real world and remember it, images of the trash will be generated in their dreams. Although people don't have to eat in dreams, they can still run restaurants and create new recipes there...

t_ch: 这两者都是意识的投影，并无本质区别，当然可以出现在同一片舞台上。
t_en: Both are the projections of consciousness with no fundamental differences. Of course, they can appear on the same platform.

t_ch: 在梦里不捡垃圾也没关系吧？
t_en: It's okay not to pick up trash in a dream, right?

t_ch: 梦是潜意识的海洋，往往反应了一个人最真实的想法。
t_en: Your dream is the ocean of your subconscious, and it reflects your genuine thoughts.

t_ch: 如果一个人做梦时都不能把垃圾丢进桶里，那他在现实保护环境的概率也不会很高。
t_en: If someone can't even throw trash properly when dreaming, it's unlikely that person will care much about the environment in real life.

t_ch: 有机生物的观念来源于记忆。只有通过重复动作加深印象，才能养成良好的习惯——所以我希望大家都能捡起身边的垃圾。
t_en: Organic lives form their perceptions based on memory. One can only cultivate a good habit by repeating an action and strengthening their memory of it. Therefore, I hope everyone can pick up the surrounding trash.

t_ch: 我在现实里拥有回收垃圾的模块，这项功能也被我带进了梦境…可能是日有所思夜有所梦吧。
t_en: I'm equipped with a trash disposal module in reality, so the feature has come with me into the Dreamscape... Perhaps what's on my mind during the day goes into my dream at night.

t_ch: 总之，只要能得到垃圾，我就可以对它们进行无害化分解。
t_en: Anyway, I can break down all trash that comes my way into harmless substances.

t_ch: 这会是一份极具价值的事业。可惜筑梦边境的工作让我抽不开身，没法亲自搜集各地的垃圾。
t_en: This is going to be a profitable business, but I'm too busy with my work at the Dream's Edge to collect trash myself.

t_ch: 哎，如果有人能帮我把垃圾弄来就好了……
t_en: Alas, if only someone could help me gather the trash...

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 你愿意帮忙？真是…太值得敬佩了。你所行之事足以让宇宙免于毁灭。
t_en: You can help? That's... a respectable move. Your actions will spare the universe from destruction.

t_ch: 等垃圾回收完毕后，我会向你献上最崇高的赞许。
t_en: When you're done collecting all the trash, I'll offer you my highest compliments.

t_ch: 我能得到什么好处？
t_en: What's in this for me?

t_ch: …如果你愿意参与这项事业，等垃圾回收完毕后，我会向你献上最崇高的赞许。
t_en: ...If you're willing to get involved in this endeavor, I'll offer you my highest compliments when you're done collecting the trash.

t_ch: 时刻记得，你所行之事足以让宇宙免于毁灭。
t_en: Always bear in mind that your actions are enough to spare the universe from destruction.

t_ch: 越是美丽的环境，越不该遭受玷污。你肯定也这么认为，对不对？
t_en: Beautiful places shouldn't be defiled by pollution. You agree with that, don't you?

t_ch: 智械陷入了沉默。一滴无机的泪——也可能是油——从她眼角滑落，在金属脸颊上留下一道湿痕。
t_en: The Intellitron falls silent. An inorganic teardrop — which is probably oil — rolls down from the corner of her eye, leaving a mark on her metal face.

t_ch: 诶？奇怪，为什么我明明没有感到悲伤，却还是流泪了……
t_en: Eh? Why am I tearing up when I don't feel sad?

t_ch: 而且，机器应该是不会哭的才对……
t_en: Also, a robot isn't supposed to cry...

t_ch: 但智械会哭。
t_en: But Intellitrons do cry.

t_ch: 对哦，我是智械…我现在已经是智械了。
t_en: Right, I'm an Intellitron... I'm already an Intellitron now.

t_ch: 喜悦有时也会带来眼泪。
t_en: There are tears of joy, too.

t_ch: 喜悦…是啊，我应该感到喜悦才对。
t_en: Joy... Yes, I should be feeling joyful.

t_ch: 眼前的智械发出一串电子笑声，里面似乎蕴含着某种…劫后余生的庆幸。
t_en: The Intellitron before you lets out a robotic laughter with a hint of relief.

t_ch: 原本，我的生命轨迹和匹诺康尼绝不会有交集。如今我却站在这个梦里，还能用双手为它添砖加瓦…现在回想起来，依旧觉得难以置信。
t_en: Penacony had nothing to do with my life in the beginning. But now, here I am contributing to its development with my hands... I still find my experience unbelievable even to this day.

t_ch: 最初我并不是智械，甚至不是这副人形的身躯。但后来发生了一些事，让我变成了现在的模样。这是命运赠予我的第二次生命。
t_en: At first, I wasn't an Intellitron and didn't even exist in this humanoid figure. Something cropped up later, and it turned me into what I am today. I was fortunate enough to be reborn.

t_ch: 我想我应该珍惜这个机会，好好看看那座名为「黄金的时刻」的城市，看看前人缔造出的美梦……
t_en: I should make use of this opportunity to take a good look at that city called Golden Hour. It's a beautiful dreamland built by our predecessors...

t_ch: 原来的你是什么模样？
t_en: What were you like from before?

t_ch: 原来的模样…我羞于回忆。如果你真想知道，就答应帮我办一件事吧。
t_en: I'm... a little embarrassed to recall it now. If you really want to know, agree to do a favor for me.

t_ch: 你没逛过「黄金的时刻」？
t_en: Haven't you been to Golden Hour?

t_ch: 说来惭愧，一来到匹诺康尼，我便马不停蹄地投入了筑梦边境的工作…想来是工具习性难改。
t_en: Honestly, as soon as I set foot in Penacony, I dove headfirst into the work at the Dream's Edge... I suppose some habits are just hard to shake.

t_ch: 不介意的话，能帮我一个忙吗？
t_en: Do you mind doing me a favor?

t_ch: 如今我职责缠身，没办法离开筑梦边境…我的特殊身份也不允许我随便离开。
t_en: I can't leave the Dream's Edge because of my duties... My unusual identity doesn't allow me to go anywhere I like either.

t_ch: 所以，我希望你能帮我拍几张照片，让我把这些影像铭刻进存储系统里。
t_en: I hope you can take a few photos for me so that I can keep them in my storage system.

t_ch: 刚进入梦境时，那座高耸的<color=#dbc291ff>酒店大楼</color>曾让我心潮澎湃。但我对它的印象已经有些模糊了……
t_en: When I first arrived at the Dreamscape, that <color=#dbc291ff>towering hotel</color> took my breath away. However, I can barely remember how it looks now...

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 谢谢你，年轻的生命——记得把建筑拍完整些。
t_en: Thank you, youngster. Remember to include every part of the building in the photos.

t_ch: 这里视线不错，把格-蕾要的照片拍了吧。
t_en: This spot has a good view. I should probably take the photo that Go-Ray wants here.

t_ch: 那座高耸的<color=#dbc291ff>酒店大楼</color>曾让我心潮澎湃，希望你把它拍完整些。
t_en: That <color=#dbc291ff>towering hotel</color> took my breath away. Please include every part of the building in the photos.

t_ch: 辛苦你了，我看看……
t_en: Thanks for your hard work. Let me see...

t_ch: 果然，这栋建筑还是和我印象中一样高大、宏伟…就像一件武器。
t_en: Indeed, the building is still as tall and grand as I remember it. It looks just like a weapon.

t_ch: 一座建在地上，朝天空发射的巨炮。它开火时，能量从四周涌向底座，光芒足以刺破最浓厚的雾霾。
t_en: It looks like a giant rocket on the ground, aiming at the sky. When it is fired, energy surges to its base from all sides, emitting a radiance so bright it can penetrate the thickest of smoke.

t_ch: 如果是从前的我，见到它应该会很激动。
t_en: The old me would have been thrilled to see it.

t_ch: 你好有想象力…
t_en: You have a fertile imagination.

t_ch: 你好懂…
t_en: You're so knowledgeable...

t_ch: 我的家乡是个不和平的星球。自从我被挖出来起，战争就没有一刻停歇。
t_en: My hometown was a chaotic place. The war hasn't ceased for a moment since I was dug out.

t_ch: 据说在更加古早的从前，我的家乡还是个鸟语花香的地方。人们掌握了宇宙航行的能力，把足迹踏遍数个星球——我就是在那时被制造出的智能飞船之一。
t_en: In ancient times, my hometown used to be an invigorating and scenic planet. People at that time, who already mastered the ability to navigate across the universe, had traveled to numerous planets. I was one of the intelligent spaceships created at that time.

t_ch: 但两大组织的战争改变了一切。不知出于什么原因，双方开始拿出压箱底的武器相互攻击……
t_en: Yet, the war between two major factions changed everything. For some unknown reasons, the two sides started attacking each other using their most formidable weapons...

t_ch: 所有外星基地都被摧毁，母星也因此陷入了漫长的冬天。科技断层，环境恶化，美好生活不再。
t_en: All bases on other planets were destroyed, and our home planet was plunged into a long winter. The development of our technology became stunted, and the environment deteriorated, and there went our good lives.

t_ch: 当我醒来时，战争仍在废墟上继续进行。人们给尾巴系上不同颜色的布条，手持枪支和棍棒互相攻伐。
t_en: By the time I woke up, the war was still ongoing at the ruins. People tied cloths of different colors to their tails as they attacked each other with guns and sticks.

t_ch: 他们见到我，第一反应就是——这东西能带来胜利。
t_en: The moment they saw me, they immediately got the impression that I could bring them victory.

t_ch: 智械播放了一段系统录音……
t_en: The Intellitron plays a system recording...

t_ch: 「瞧瞧我们发现了什么，前文明的宇航机器！我们就要胜利了！」
t_en: "Look what we found — a pre-civilization space machine! We're about to win!"

t_ch: 「你那么激动干什么？」
t_en: "Why are you so excited?"

t_ch: 「想想看，我们在宇宙中曾经有那么多军事基地，里面肯定保存着前文明时期的超级兵器。」
t_en: "Think about all the military bases we used to have across the universe. There must be a lot of pre-civilization superweapons there."

t_ch: 「只要能把那些兵器拿到手，胜利的天平就会向我们倾斜了！」
t_en: "If we can find those weapons, we'll be one step closer to victory!"

t_ch: 「希望这破烂对得起它消耗的燃料——那可是我们省吃俭用攒下来的。」
t_en: "I hope this hunk of junk is worth the fuel. We all had to tighten our belts to afford it."

t_ch: 「见鬼，这玩意的门怎么打不开？」
t_en: "Rats. Why can't I open the door to this thing?"

t_ch: 「没看这边写着嘛，『无人式智能深空勘探机』…哦，还有触控面板呢，挺人性化。」
t_en: "Didn't you see this? It's an "Unmanned Intelligent Space Explorer"... Oh, there's even a touch panel. How user-friendly."

t_ch: 「行了，我已经设定好让它回收各个星球的残留兵器了，之后就等着好消息吧。」
t_en: "Done. I've set it up to collect the other remaining weapons on other planets. Let's see what it can bring back to us."

t_ch: 那时的我以执行命令为天职，不知思考为何物，只能将这条指示奉为圭臬。
t_en: At that time, my job was to carry out any instructions given to me. I could not think, so I followed the instructions blindly.

t_ch: 我驶过寂静已久的航道，曾经热闹的星球仅剩一片荒凉。
t_en: When I sailed along the route that had long been unused, a planet, once thriving, was quiet and desolate.

t_ch: 没有文明，也没有残余的兵器。整整三个琥珀纪过去，什么都没能留下。
t_en: There was no civilization and remaining weapons. Nothing was left in the past three Amber Eras.

t_ch: 如果那时的我已经拥有了感情，我想我会感到孤独…还有恐惧。
t_en: If I had feelings at that time, I would have felt lonely... and scared.

t_ch: 在那之后，我又走过许多星球，结局不外如是。一种「情绪」开始在我的系统中萌芽——怀疑。
t_en: I visited many more planets after that, and they all wound up the same way. A "feeling" started germinating in my system: Skepticism.

t_ch: 真的还有存在生命的星球吗？我还能完成自己的使命吗？这样的探寻…真的有意义吗？
t_en: "Does life still exist on any of those planets? Will I be able to accomplish my mission? Is my search... meaningful?"

t_ch: 最后，我耗尽了燃料，搁浅在一颗小行星上……
t_en: At last, I used up my fuel and was stranded on an asteroid...

t_ch: 你死了？
t_en: You died?

t_ch: 哈哈，当然没有，不然我还怎么站在这呢？
t_en: Haha, of course not, otherwise how could I still be standing here?

t_ch: 好可怜…
t_en: How terrible...

t_ch: 有机生命很少会怜悯机器，毕竟那时的我只是工具。不过后来发生的事改变了我。
t_en: Few organic lives have sympathy for a robot, which was what I was at that time. An incident that happened later changed me.

t_ch: 后来发生了什么？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 当我再次醒来时，我已经换上了这副人形的躯壳，思维与计算也灵敏了许多。
t_en: When I woke up again, I was already in this human body. My ability to think and calculate improved a great deal.

t_ch: 有人唤醒了我，改造了我的身躯，还为我起了名字…简直像是一份恩赐，不是吗？
t_en: Someone awakened me, transformed my body, and gave me a name... Sounds like a blessing, no?

t_ch: 但那究竟是谁的手笔，我到现在也没能想通。
t_en: I still can't figure out who did it.

t_ch: 某位天才？
t_en: A genius, perhaps?

t_ch: 的确有可能，毕竟那改造所需的技术…十分精妙。
t_en: Maybe. After all, the technology required to pull off that transformation is... intricate.

t_ch: 某支路过的无名客？
t_en: A Nameless who happened to pass by?

t_ch: 那改造所需的技术十分精妙…无名客真能做到吗？
t_en: The technology required to pull off that transformation is... intricate... Would a Nameless be able to do that?

t_ch: 某个星神？
t_en: An Aeon?

t_ch: 真是太抬举我了——我不认为我有被星神注视的潜力，我只是一台机器。
t_en: I'm flattered. But as a mere robot, I don't think I deserve the attention of an Aeon.

t_ch: 不过，无论那人是谁，他应该都是爱着机械的。就像父亲爱着自己的孩子，君王爱着自己的臣民。
t_en: No matter who it was, they must have had a love for machinery like how a father loves his child and a king loves his people.

t_ch: 刚获得新生时，我曾对家乡的人类心怀愤怒。但是现在，我对他们只有怜悯。
t_en: In the early period after I was reborn, I was angry at the people from my home world. But now, I only pity them.

t_ch: 深陷战争的人们总会祈求和平，希望有什么东西来拯救自己。
t_en: Those caught in the throes of war always yearn for peace, hoping that someone or something will come to their aid.

t_ch: 那东西可以是奇迹、是伟人、是远在天外的星神，甚至是…强大到足以终结战争的武器。
t_en: It can be a miracle, a respectable figure, a faraway Aeon, or even a weapon powerful enough to end the war.

t_ch: 遗憾的是，人类永远不会满足于手头的武器。战争结束后，他们依旧会索求更大、更强的武器，直到玩火自焚，把视线所及的一切都烧成灰烬。
t_en: The thing is, humans are never satisfied with what they have. After a war ceases, they will continue their search for bigger and stronger weapons until their greed backfires and razes everything they have to the ground.

t_ch: 所以，我的使命不仅无法拯救家乡，反而会把它推入毁灭的深渊……
t_en: Thus, not only was my mission incapable of salvaging my home, but it would push it further down the abyss of ruination...

t_ch: 感觉真是讽刺。
t_en: Sounds ironic.

t_ch: 感觉真是悲哀。
t_en: Sounds disheartening.

t_ch: 没办法，人类就是这么热衷于互相扇耳光。身边有木棍，他们就会使用木棍；有虚数弹，他们就会使用虚数弹。
t_en: Well, humans just tend to want to cause harm to each other. If there's a wooden stick at hand, they'll use it. If there's an imaginary bomb around, they'll use it too.

t_ch: 幸运的是，战争这会儿应该已经结束了。
t_en: Fortunately, the war should be over by this time.

t_ch: 我出发时，母星的能源就开始逼近枯竭。如今又一个琥珀纪过去，根据我的计算，那里已无人烟。
t_en: The sources of energy on my home planet were already close to depletion when I left. Now that an Amber Era has passed, the planet should be uninhabited, according to my estimation.

t_ch: 武器将会锈蚀，绿草重新生长，土地缓慢地修复创伤……
t_en: The weapons will rust, the grass will grow back, and the soil will slowly recuperate...

t_ch: 只是，再没人能欣赏那个复苏的世界了。
t_en: Sadly, there's no one left to appreciate that revived world.

t_ch: 至少你活了下来。
t_en: At least you survived.

t_ch: 格-蕾的脸上闪过一丝欢喜。智械本不会有表情，但在梦里，一切皆有可能。
t_en: A hint of joy flashes on Go-Ray's face. Intellitrons aren't supposed to have facial expressions, but everything is possible in a dream.

t_ch: 是啊，我活了下来。没有什么比活着更美好了。
t_en: Indeed, I survived. Nothing is better than staying alive.

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 格-蕾的脸上闪过一丝悲凉。智械本不会有表情，但在梦里，一切皆有可能。
t_en: A hint of sorrow flashes on Go-Ray's face. Intellitrons aren't supposed to have facial expressions, but everything is possible in a dream.

t_ch: 至少，我活了下来。没有什么比活着更美好了。
t_en: At least I survived. Nothing is better than staying alive.

t_ch: 经历过那么多事，如今我终于找到了自己的归宿——匹诺康尼。我要在这里以一个人，而非工具的身份活下去。
t_en: After so many twists and turns, I've finally found a place where I belong — Penacony. I want to live my life here as a human, instead of a tool.

t_ch: 感谢你，年轻的生命，感谢你对我的帮助，也感谢你愿意听我诉说。
t_en: Thank you, young one, for helping me and hearing me out.

t_ch: 不管你是否在意，我的存储设备都会永远为你留出一个角落。
t_en: You might think this is nothing, but I'll always reserve a slot in my storage system for you.

t_ch: 即便智械的脸只是纯色金属，你还是能从中品出些许愤怒。
t_en: Although the Intellitron's face is made of metal, you can still discern a touch of rage in her expression.

t_ch: 格-蕾的身体突然发出一阵颤抖。即便她的脸只是纯色金属，你还是能从中品出些许愤怒。
t_en: Go-Ray's body shudders all of a sudden. Although her face is made of metal, you can still discern a touch of rage in her expression.

t_ch: 有时我就搞不明白了，明明宇宙中的宜居星球那么稀少，却总有人变着法子破坏它们——到底是图什么呢？
t_en: I'm baffled. There are already so few livable planets in this universe, yet there are always people finding ways to destroy them. What are they trying to achieve?

t_ch: 来匹诺康尼之前，我曾在一个污染严重的星球上生活过一阵。那地方遍地工厂，排放出的黑烟遮天蔽日……
t_en: Before coming to Penacony, I stayed on a heavily polluted planet for a while. That place was full of factories spewing black smoke that covered the sky...

t_ch: 我向当地的统治者提出意见，请求取缔这些重污染产业。可他们的反应是什么？讽刺和挖苦！
t_en: I reached out to the rulers of the planet and requested for actions to be taken against the industries that caused heavy pollution, but guess how they reacted to me? Sarcasm and degradation!

t_ch: 真是不见棺材不落泪！恐怕只有等出现了不可挽回的后果后，他们才能明白保护环境的重要性。
t_en: They'll only realize the importance of preserving the environment when they suffer the consequences!

t_ch: 格-蕾的身体突然发出一阵颤抖。即便她的脸只是纯色金属，你还是能从中品出些许愤怒。
t_en: Go-Ray's body shudders all of a sudden. Although her face is made of metal, you can still discern a touch of rage in her expression.

t_ch: 有时我就搞不明白了，明明宇宙中的宜居星球那么稀少，却总有人变着法子破坏它们——到底是图什么呢？
t_en: I'm baffled. There are already so few livable planets in this universe, yet there are always people finding ways to destroy them. What are they trying to achieve?

t_ch: 来匹诺康尼之前，我曾在一个污染严重的星球上生活过一阵。那地方遍地工厂，排放出的黑烟遮天蔽日……
t_en: Before coming to Penacony, I stayed on a heavily polluted planet for a while. That place was full of factories spewing black smoke that covered the sky...

t_ch: 我向当地的统治者提出意见，请求取缔这些重污染产业。可他们的反应是什么？讽刺和挖苦！
t_en: I reached out to the rulers of the planet and requested for actions to be taken against the industries that caused heavy pollution, but guess how they reacted to me? Sarcasm and degradation!

t_ch: 真是不见棺材不落泪！恐怕只有等出现了不可挽回的后果后，他们才能明白保护环境的重要性。
t_en: They'll only realize the importance of preserving the environment when they suffer the consequences!

t_ch: 越是美丽的环境，越不该遭受玷污。你肯定也这么认为，对不对？
t_en: Beautiful places shouldn't be defiled by pollution. You agree with that, don't you?

t_ch: 格-蕾的脸色恢复了平静，正如智械一贯的模样。
t_en: Go-Ray regains her composure. Her face returns to her usual expression.

t_ch: 仔细想想，我其实没有能力阻止战争、防治污染，也不能让爱与和平充满宇宙——或许只有星神才可以。
t_en: Now that I think about it, I know I don't have the power to stop wars, prevent pollution, or fill this universe with love and peace. Aeons are probably the only ones who can.

t_ch: 我没法去做那些惊天动地的大事、影响整个银河，但却可以做到力所能及的小事，影响身边的人。
t_en: I'm not capable of doing groundbreaking stuff that can affect the entire cosmos, but I can do small things within my capacity to affect the people around me.

t_ch: 比如…呼吁人们保护环境，把垃圾丢进垃圾桶里。
t_en: Like... raising the awareness of environmental preservation and encouraging people to dispose of their trash properly.

t_ch: 想要避免其他星球重蹈我母星的覆辙，这是最实在的路了。
t_en: This is the most pragmatic approach to prevent other planets from going down the same road as my home planet.

t_ch: 我能成为筑梦师中的一员，简直是命运的馈赠啊。
t_en: I'm so lucky to be a Dreamweaver.

t_ch: 格-蕾的声线带上了一丝悦耳的欣喜——这对她的合成音来说难度不小。
t_en: Go-Ray's voice is tinged with content, a challenging feat for her synthetic voice.

t_ch: 大家都说「筑梦边境」是荒凉的半成品。但我觉得，这里是我见过最美的地方。
t_en: Everyone sees the Dream's Edge as a dreary piece of unfinished work, but I think it's the most beautiful place I've ever seen.

t_ch: 看啊，人们时而交谈、时而欢笑，都在为一个共同的目标努力着；就算偶尔争吵，也不会有谁带着恶意攻击他人。
t_en: Look, people here are chatting and laughing from time to time as they work toward the same goal. Arguments happen occasionally, but no one means any harm to others.

t_ch: 要合作，不要战争。我觉得这才是宇宙最美好的状态。
t_en: Collaboration, not conflict, is the way to go.

t_ch: 而我的母星…倘若我真回到了那里，估计也不会看到人们握手言和。
t_en: As for my home planet... even if I go back, I don't think I'll see the people there bury their hatchets.

t_ch: 相比之下，我能成为这里的一份子，简直是命运的馈赠啊！
t_en: In comparison, I'm so lucky to be a part of this place!

t_ch: 机会难得，就让我也送你一些馈赠吧。
t_en: Since fate brings us together, I shall offer you some gifts.

t_ch: 格-蕾的声线带上了一丝悦耳的欣喜——这对她的合成音来说难度不小。
t_en: Go-Ray's voice is tinged with content, a challenging feat for her synthetic voice.

t_ch: 大家都说「筑梦边境」是荒凉的半成品。但我觉得，这里是我见过最美的地方。
t_en: Everyone sees the Dream's Edge as a dreary piece of unfinished work, but I think it's the most beautiful place I've ever seen.

t_ch: 看啊，人们时而交谈、时而欢笑，都在为一个共同的目标努力着；就算偶尔争吵，也不会有谁带着恶意攻击他人。
t_en: Look, people here are chatting and laughing from time to time as they work toward the same goal. Arguments happen occasionally, but no one means any harm to others.

t_ch: 要合作，不要战争。我觉得这才是宇宙最美好的状态。
t_en: Collaboration, not conflict, is the way to go.

t_ch: 再看我的母星…倘若我真回到了那里，估计也不会看到人们握手言和。
t_en: As for my home planet... even if I go back, I don't think I'll see the people there bury their hatchets.

t_ch: 相比之下，我能成为这些人中的一员，简直是命运的馈赠啊！
t_en: In comparison, I'm so lucky to be a part of this place!

t_ch: 我是家乡的罪人吗？我是不是亲手葬送了大家的未来呢……
t_en: Was I the culprit who ruined the future of my home planet?

t_ch: 格-蕾的表情没有变化，但她的情绪肉眼可见地消沉了下去。
t_en: There is no change in Go-Ray's expression, but you can sense her despair.

t_ch: 我…又开始感到困扰了。自从蒙受恩赐、获得智慧之后，这种感觉就越发强烈。
t_en: I... have doubts again. This sensation has grown more and more intense since I underwent the transformation and gained wisdom.

t_ch: 这些年来，我也听说过一些拥有可怕武器、却彼此形成对等威慑的和平世界。这么看来，武器也不一定会招致毁灭，反倒可能真正地消灭战争。
t_en: Over the years, I've heard of worlds that own terrible weapons to deter one another from starting a war. In this light, weapons do not necessarily lead to war, but can actually prevent it from happening.

t_ch: …如果当时我完成了使命，母星的情况会不会真能好转起来？
t_en: ...If I had been able to complete my mission back then, would the situation on my home planet have taken a turn for the better?

t_ch: 我是家乡的罪人吗？我是不是亲手葬送了大家的未来呢……
t_en: Was I the culprit who ruined the future of my home planet?

t_ch: 但是一切都结束了，再去思考这些也晚了。唉……
t_en: Everything is over, so there's no point in mulling over such a possibility. *sigh*

t_ch: 我有话想跟你说。
t_en: I want to talk to you about something.

t_ch: 你为何如此热衷于保护环境？
t_en: Why are you so passionate about protecting the environment?

t_ch: 宇宙中绝大多数星球没有良好的环境。它们荒凉、残破，如同划痕遍布表面的石块。
t_en: Most planets in the universe are in an atrocious state. They are desolate and inhospitable, like rocks with scratches all over their surfaces.

t_ch: 我见识过星球被毁坏后的样子，所以明白眼前景色的宝贵。
t_en: I've seen what a devastated planet looks like, so I value the beautiful scenery I get to enjoy now.

t_ch: 被命运馈赠却不自知的人，最终一定会品味失去的痛苦…我不想看到那种事情发生。
t_en: Those who take their blessings for granted will surely feel the pain of losing them one day... I don't want that to happen.

t_ch: 每个鸟语花香的天堂都值得珍惜，无论它是虚幻亦或现实。
t_en: Every gorgeous paradise should be cherished, whether it is imaginary or real.

t_ch: 你也是筑梦师吗？
t_en: Are you a Dreamweaver too?

t_ch: 准确的说，我是这片区域的筑梦助理，负责分担算力、提供素材等基础工作。
t_en: To be more precise, I assist in the dream building work of this area. I'm responsible for basic tasks like calculation and providing materials.

t_ch: 最开始我并不想同意，因为我对人类社会不够了解，未必能胜任这份差事。
t_en: I was hesitant to take up this job at first, thinking I didn't know enough about human society to be up for the task.

t_ch: 但家族对我…对我的经历很感兴趣。我最终还是没能拒绝。
t_en: But The Family... was interested in my experience. I couldn't refuse.

t_ch: 你为什么在身上刻自己的名字？
t_en: Why did you carve your name into your body?

t_ch: 实际上，那不是后天刻上去的——它就是我身体的一部分。
t_en: Well, actually, I was born like that.

t_ch: 当我拥有这副身躯时，我也拥有了这个赐名。
t_en: I was given the name the moment I had this body.

t_ch: 有机生命或许很难理解这层关系…我已经习惯了。
t_en: It might be hard for organic lives to comprehend this kind of relationship... I'm used to it.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 再见，请时刻注意周围的环境。
t_en: Goodbye. Please take care of the environment at all times.

t_ch: 我带来了垃圾。
t_en: I've brought trash for you.

t_ch: 你居然…真的带来了？
t_en: I'm surprised... that you actually did it.

t_ch: 稍等，我开下系统模块。
t_en: Please wait while I activate the system module.

t_ch: 「回收模块已启动，请出示要处理的垃圾。」
t_en: "Trash disposal module activated. Please present the trash to be disposed of."

t_ch: 「侦测到垃圾投放，开始执行回收程序。」
t_en: "Trash detected. Disposal program started."

t_ch: 智械将垃圾收进了体内。
t_en: The Intellitron took the trash into her body.

t_ch: 「垃圾回收已完成，感谢您为环保做出的贡献。」
t_en: "Disposal completed. Thank you for your contribution to the environment."

t_ch: 我带来了垃圾。
t_en: I've brought trash for you.

t_ch: 你保护环境的热情值得赞许，但我感觉有些…过度饱腹。
t_en: Your eco-friendly spirit is laudable, but I'm... too stuffed at the moment.

t_ch: 看来之前的那些垃圾需要时间才能彻底分解，我暂时无法接收垃圾了。
t_en: Looks like I need some time to fully break down the previous batch of trash. I can't take more for the time being.

t_ch: …这是…怎么回事？
t_en: ...What... is going on?

t_ch: …嗯…好，我会照顾好自己的，你放心…咦，怎么还有未撤离的宾客？
t_en: ...Yes... Okay, I'll take care of myself. Don't worry... Huh? There are guests who haven't evacuated?

t_ch: 喂，罗斯玛丽，我先挂了，待会处理完再联系你……
t_en: Hey Rosemary, I'm going now. I'll talk to you again once I'm done...

t_ch: 梦境酒店现在已经被封锁了，非指定工作人员不得入内。
t_en: The hotel in the dreamscape has been locked down. Unrelated personnel are prohibited from entering.
